zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Luttrell於1394年出生在英國薩默塞特登斯特時，他的父親Sir Hugh Luttrell30歲，母親Katherine Beaumont40歲。他於1422年與Margaret Touchet在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1430年6月30日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特享年36歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特布盧頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Luttrell于1394年出生在英国薩默塞特登斯特时，他的父亲Sir Hugh Luttrell30岁，母亲Katherine Beaumont40岁。他于1422年与Margaret Touchet在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1430年6月30日在英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特享年36岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特布盧頓。

nameMeanings.name: Luttrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): from a diminutive of Old French loutre ‘otter’ (from Latin lutra), applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble an otter, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who hunted otters (for their pelts). Compare Luter and Litteral .

variants.name: Luter
meanings: from Old French loutre ‘otter’, either used as a nickname, or alternatively as a metonymic occupational name to denote an otter hunter.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Luttrell was born in 1394, in Dunster, Somerset, England, his father, Sir Hugh Luttrell, was 30 and his mother, Katherine Beaumont, was 40. He married Margaret Touchet in 1422, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 30 June 1430, in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36, and was buried in Bruton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Luttrell est né en 1394, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Luttrell, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Katherine Beaumont, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Touchet en 1422, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 30 juin 1430, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Bruton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Luttrell 1394 in Dunster, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh Luttrell 30 und seine Mutter Katherine Beaumont 40. Er hat 1422 in Somerset, England Margaret Touchet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 30. Juni 1430 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bruton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Luttrell è nato il nel 1394 nel Dunster, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Sir Hugh Luttrell, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Beaumont, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Touchet nel 1422, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 30 giugno 1430, nel Dunster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Bruton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Luttrellが1394年にイギリスソメルセトダンスターで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Luttrellは30歳，母Katherine Beaumontは40歳であった。1422年にイギリスソメルセトでMargaret Touchetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1430年6月30日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスターで36歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトブルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Luttrell(이)가 1394년 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh Luttrell(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Beaumont(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1422년 영국 서머세트에서 Margaret Touchet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1430년 6월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 브루턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Luttrell nasceu em 1394, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh Luttrell, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Beaumont, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Touchet em 1422, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de junho de 1430, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Bruton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Luttrell родился в 1394 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh Luttrell было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Beaumont, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Touchet в 1422 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 30 июня 1430 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности брутон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Luttrell nació en 1394, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh Luttrell, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Katherine Beaumont, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Margaret Touchet en 1422, en Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 30 de junio de 1430, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Bruton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
